title: Gender Equality Week Act
description: Gender Equality Week Act (Gender Equality Week Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Gender Equality Week Act .

provisions.title: Gender Equality Week
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the fourth week in September is to be known as “Gender Equality Week”.
